introSection: Comet Jr. was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Myrtle Beach Pavilion in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA. It oepned in 1951 and clsoed between 1966 and 1970.
fullText: Comet Jr. was a wooden roller coaster previously located at Myrtle Beach Pavilion in Myrtle Beach, South Carolina, USA. It oepned in 1951 and clsoed between 1966 and 1970.
